title: LongStraw: Long-Context RL Beyond 2M Tokens under a Fixed GPU Budget
innovation_summary: LongStraw: Long-Context RL Beyond 2M Tokens under a Fixed GPU Budget: A growing gap separates inference context lengths from RL post-training: inference systems are approaching million-token contexts, while post-training workloads often remain at 256K tokens or below.
